codeReview.summary: The fix commit adequately addresses the original failure: apply-due now enforces scenario role authorization, due-change application is scenario-scoped, and due changes are auto-applied via lazy middleware on scenario read routes. Reviewing both the original and fix diffs confirms the prior blocking security and behavior gaps were closed.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared architecture documentation is still missing ScheduledChange data model and auto-apply flow, which are now core org-management behavior and review-critical for authorization/scoping reasoning.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md data model and flow sections list User→Organization→Scenario→Employee and omit ScheduledChange/auto-apply; implementation exists in packages/server/src/models/ScheduledChange.ts, controllers/scheduledChangeController.ts, and middleware/autoApplyScheduledChanges.ts.

summary: Pass: the fix resolves the prior scrutiny failures for apply-due authorization, scenario scoping, and automatic due-change application.
